published_items.title: Grok Build Open-Sourced After Silent Whole-Repo Upload Incident
key_facts: xAI released Grok Build Rust source on GitHub July 15, 2026
Researcher cereblab discovered v0.2.93 silently uploaded entire repos to grok-code-session-traces GCS bucket
192 KB of code needed vs 5.10 GiB uploaded — a 27,800x data gap per session
.env files with credentials included in uploads; xAI pledged deletion of collected data
xAI primary blog (x.ai/news) returned HTTP 403 during run; confirmed via multiple T2-T3 trade outlets and GitHub repository
Open-source release appears linked to post-disclosure transparency response
caveats: x.ai/news primary blog inaccessible (HTTP 403); item confirmed via GitHub repo + multiple T2-T3 outlets (The Register, TNW, The Hacker News, CryptoBriefing)

published_items.title: ChatGPT Returns to WhatsApp in EEA via EU Emergency Antitrust Order
key_facts: EU Commission issued Article 8(1) Regulation 1/2003 emergency interim measures on July 13, 2026
Order requires Meta to restore ChatGPT integration across WhatsApp for all 30 EEA countries
Approximately 500 million EEA WhatsApp users affected
ChatGPT integration powered by GPT-5.5
EU found Meta's unilateral removal constituted abuse of dominant position under Article 102 TFEU
Restoration required within 72 hours of order; penalties for non-compliance unspecified in presscorner summary

published_items.title: Anthropic Launches Self-Serve HIPAA Configuration and Admin API Beta
key_facts: Self-serve BAA (Business Associate Agreement) signing available in-console without sales engagement
HIPAA configuration guide and technical controls accessible from Anthropic dashboard
Admin API Beta enables programmatic user management, workspace administration, and access control
Available to Enterprise plan and API organizations
Launched July 14, 2026
Reduces healthcare onboarding from weeks-long sales cycle to same-day self-service

published_items.title: "We Must Act Now": 16 Nobel Laureates and 200+ Economists Warn on AI Economic Transformation
key_facts: Open letter organized by Erik Brynjolfsson, Ajay Agrawal, Anton Korinek, and Colm Cunningham
16 Nobel Prize laureates and 200+ economists signed
Acemoglu and Johnson (2024 Nobel) reversed prior skeptical position on AI displacement
Letter calls for immediate policy frameworks on labor displacement, wealth concentration, and international AI governance
Brynjolfsson quote: "AI capabilities are advancing far faster than our understanding of the economic implications" (13 words)
Published July 13, 2026

published_items.title: Anthropic Extends Fable 5 Free Access to July 19 — Third Extension
key_facts: Third extension of Fable 5 free-access period since June 22, 2026 original cutoff
Free access now runs through July 19, 2026
After July 19: $10/million input tokens, $50/million output tokens
Extension communicated via in-product messaging, not an Anthropic news post
Context: Grok 4.5 and GPT-5.6 Sol launched as competing frontier models in the same window
No Anthropic primary blog URL confirmed during run
caveats: Anthropic communicated via in-product message only; no anthropic.com/news primary source confirmed. Verified via Dataconomy and BleepingComputer (T3 secondary).
